overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character ascends wide concrete stairs, traverses pedestrian plazas and narrow back alleys with trash bags, and crosses a busy multi-lane street beneath an illuminated highway overpass with heavy red neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide concrete stairs leading to elevated plaza

events.description: character begins ascending the stairs from the lower plaza

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide concrete stairs toward the plaza level above

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket descending the stairs
pedestrian standing at the top of the stairs near the palm tree

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with multiple steps leading upward to the plaza
large glowing green holographic display showing tourist information and maps
tall palm tree with illuminated trunk visible at the plaza level
tall dark futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and balconies
tall dark futuristic buildings with multiple lit windows

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a wide set of concrete stairs in a futuristic urban plaza at night. A large green holographic tourist billboard glows at the top of the stairs, flanked by tall residential towers. Other pedestrians are seen descending the stairs as the character climbs upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with neon storefronts and advertising

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters the open plaza area
passing under brighter street lighting and various colored neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past various pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: security guard standing near the palm tree with hands on hips
pedestrian in bright pink outfit walking across the plaza

entered.detail: flat concrete walking area with red accent lines marking paths
structure with large holographic display showing tourist maps
storefronts with glowing neon signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character enters an open pedestrian plaza illuminated by neon signs. The tourist information kiosk stands on the right with its green holographic display, while various pedestrians walk through the area. The character continues forward past storefronts with glowing signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with trash bags and construction barriers

events.description: enters narrower alleyway with trash bags and construction barriers
lighting becomes darker and more enclosed with deeper neon shadows

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alleyway past piles of trash and construction barriers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the alley

entered.detail: red and white striped barriers blocking off a construction area
piles of garbage bags and debris stacked on the sidewalk
glowing green neon sign reading OPEN above a doorway
large concrete highway overpass visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower alleyway with construction barriers on the left and piles of trash bags on the right. A green neon OPEN sign glows on the right wall. The elevated highway overpass becomes visible in the distance ahead as the character continues through the dimly lit passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane street under elevated highway with moving traffic

events.description: exits the alley and enters the open street with vehicle traffic under the overpass
multiple cars drive past on the multi-lane street
red neon lights from the underside of the overpass illuminate the scene

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the busy street under the overpass, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the street
yellow taxi driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt road with red painted curbs and lane markings
large digital screen displaying advertisements mounted above the street
various cars and taxis driving on the road with headlights illuminated
tall illuminated towers visible in the distance beyond the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character exits the alley and enters a wide open street beneath a massive elevated highway overpass illuminated with red neon lights. Multiple vehicles including a black sedan and yellow taxi drive past on the asphalt road. Large digital billboards glow above the street as the character navigates across the busy intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, holographic urban plaza into the gritty depths of a neon-lit city street. It begins with the character ascending wide concrete stairs toward a glowing green tourist billboard, flanked by towering residential buildings and descending pedestrians. As the character reaches the top, the scene opens into a pedestrian plaza filled with glowing storefronts and a holographic information kiosk. The camera then follows the character as the environment tightens into a narrow alleyway lined with construction barriers and trash bags, where a green neon sign flickers before the view opens toward a distant overpass. Finally, the passage leads out into a wide intersection beneath a massive highway overpass bathed in red neon light, with taxis and sedans streaming past under the glow of towering digital billboards.
